summary: schema 0.2.0 delivery reconciliation implementation aligns with OCR-S-9 and its selected-route ownership invariant.
inspection_summary: Compared the origin/main diff with the Story, Architecture, Spec, generated Task, route resolver, execution-state synchronization path, and focused unit/E2E coverage. The code now derives PR-directory ownership only from each selected route template, avoiding the undeclared ownership-probe Story while preserving flat-route file synchronization.
judgment_delta: Initial concern: replacing the ownership-probe comparison could weaken legacy flat-route or schema 0.2 named-profile synchronization. Final judgment: pass because the implementation selects directory versus explicit-file synchronization from the resolved canonical templates on both authorities, and the focused tests cover the prior probe failure, selected feature_slug directory copy, source/managed state sync, legacy flat-route behavior, and rollback preservation.
